name: @zawwarsami/zhub
description: JS/TS client for zhub — WiFi for AIs.
author: Zawwar Sami <zawwarsami16@gmail.com>

scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/test/manifest.test.js dist-test/test/manifest_mcp.test.js dist-test/test/protocol.test.js dist-test/test/client.test.js dist-test/test/client_url.test.js dist-test/test/client_lifecycle.test.js dist-test/test/client_stream.test.js dist-test/test/client_handle_chat.test.js dist-test/test/expose.test.js
